title: Calculator App
description: A basic calculator app that can perform basic arithmetic operations like addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

title: Basic To-Do List
description: A simple to-do list application where you can add, edit, and delete tasks. It helps you organize your day-to-day tasks.

title: Game Typing
description: A fun typing game where you need to type words or sentences as quickly and accurately as possible to earn points.

title: Weather App
description: An app that shows the weather forecast for your city. It fetches real-time data from an API and displays current weather conditions.

title: Expense Tracker
description: An application to track your daily expenses and manage your budget. It allows you to categorize and analyze your spending.
